hero.title: Keyword Ranker
hero.description: Initiate localized keyword rank queries and view snapshots of the latest results.

workspace.title: Query Workspace
workspace.runHint: Queries are only allowed after the Key pool has been saved.

status.success: Query completed. {found} hits out of {total} keywords.

keyPool.label: Key pool
keyPool.title: Key Pool Management
keyPool.description: Manage your SerpApi keys. Multiple keys distribute quota consumption and reduce rate-limit risk.
keyPool.placeholder: Enter SerpApi keys, one per line

strategy.label: Strategy
strategy.title: Query Strategy
strategy.description: Choose how to distribute your query requests.
strategy.roundRobinDesc: Distribute requests evenly across all keys in the pool.
strategy.sequentialDesc: Use keys sequentially until the current key is exhausted.

health.label: Key health
health.title: Key Health Status
health.description: SerpAPI quota data for each key.
